lines.text: I want to marry you, Princess Satoru.
I will never forget you.
Maybe next time?
Perhaps it would be nice to walk a different path.
It's this now.
You want it to become a human.
Oh yeah, I know.
You don't want to actually be human.
You want the position.
Did I get that right?
Even though I understand it.
It's so foolish.
You really should have just burnt everything down.
Burnt everything down to a cinder without giving it a thought.
Casting the sideways future everything until you finally reached
Satoru Gojo.
They're hungry to seize your ideals.
That's what you were truly lacking.
Even so, you managed to entertain me a bit.
I fought human sorcerers in Chris' spirits a thousand years ago,
and he was still one of the better ones I f -
You are strong.
Ryo and Suguru is an imaginary,
fierce god with four arms and two
faces. But he once existed as
an actual human being, although
it was over a thousand years
ago.
In the Golden Age of Jujutsu,
sorcerers gathered all their might
to challenge him, and he failed.
Crowned with the title of Suguru,
we couldn't even destroy his brainwax
as he traversed the ages after death
as a cursed object.
Without a doubt, he is the king of curses.
By using the X -rays, the analyzation of Ryo Mitsukuna has begun.
It reflected upon Kashima's eyes.
The result was...
absolute perfection.
You're similar to Yamata No Orochi,
but the Shikigami's ability is to adapt
to anything and everything. Move.
So this is Sukuna.
His strength is of a different kind
than even Satoru Gojo's.
It's overwhelmingly evil.
I fear that any move we make now might result in sudden
death.
You hold your heads quite high.
What a wonderful era to be reawakened.
Women and children are crawling everywhere like maggots!
How marvelous!
It'll be a massacre!
